title: MLB 1st inning market types + SGO provider aliases

live_db_evidence.description: Migration applied via Supabase MCP. 3 new market_type rows (1i_moneyline, 1i_spread, 1i_total_ou), 3 MLB availability rows, 4 SGO aliases covering points-all-1i-ml, points-all-1i-ml3way, points-all-1i-sp, points-all-1i-ou.

runtime_change_note: Pure data migration — no code changed. Adds catalog rows so 1st inning MLB markets appear in the smart-form market-family picker. Resolves 254+ unaliased SGO offer rows per live provider_offers audit.
